channel.title: experimentum on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in experimentum on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Experimentum Data Wrangling Demo
item.description: Experimentum studies require that you download data from questionnaires and experiments separately, since the data have different formats. You can participate anonymously in the study below at https://exp.psy.gla.ac.uk/project?demodata&autond (the median completion time is 3.8 minutes). Questionnaire Data The study has two questionnaires: Groups and the Brief Mood Introspection Scale (BMIS). Names are in the column quest_name and the questionnaire ID is in quest_id (even if you gave multiple questionnaires the same name, the ID is guaranteed to be unique).
